_doc: Launch original sectional — Mensuration. Generated from computed templates; no competitor question text copied.

questions.stem_en: Find the area of a rectangle of length 12 cm and breadth 8 cm.
questions.stem_hi: Length 12 cm और breadth 8 cm वाले rectangle का area ज्ञात कीजिए।

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Found perimeter 2(l+b)=40 instead of area.
options.trap_reason_hi: Area की जगह perimeter 2(l+b)=40 निकाला।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Added length and breadth. Area requires multiplication l×b.
options.trap_reason_hi: Length और breadth add कर दिए। Area में l×b multiply होता है।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Doubled the area. Rectangle area is l×b, not 2lb.
options.trap_reason_hi: Area double कर दिया। Rectangle area l×b है, 2lb नहीं।

questions.explanation_method_en: Rectangle area = l×b = 12×8 = 96 cm². Therefore, answer = 96 cm².
questions.explanation_concept_en: Area counts square units covering the surface. A rectangle has l rows of b unit squares, so l×b squares are needed. Final answer is 96 cm².
questions.explanation_method_hi: Rectangle area = l×b = 12×8 = 96 cm²। अतः answer = 96 cm²।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Area surface को cover करने वाले square units count करता है। Rectangle में l×b unit squares होते हैं। Final answer 96 cm² है।

questions.stem_en: Find the total surface area of a cube of side 6 cm.
questions.stem_hi: Side 6 cm वाले cube का total surface area ज्ञात कीजिए।

options.label: A
options.trap_reason_en: Found volume a³=216 instead of surface area.
options.trap_reason_hi: Surface area की जगह volume a³=216 निकाला।

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Found area of one face only. A cube has 6 faces.
options.trap_reason_hi: सिर्फ एक face का area निकाला। Cube में 6 faces होते हैं।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Counted only 4 faces, missing top and bottom faces.
options.trap_reason_hi: सिर्फ 4 faces गिने, top और bottom छोड़ दिए।

questions.explanation_method_en: TSA of cube = 6a² = 6×6² = 216 cm². Therefore, answer = 216 cm².
questions.explanation_concept_en: A cube has six equal square faces. Total surface area is the area of one face multiplied by six. Final answer is 216 cm².
questions.explanation_method_hi: Cube का TSA = 6a² = 6×6² = 216 cm²। अतः answer = 216 cm²।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Cube में 6 equal square faces होते हैं। Total surface area = one face area × 6। Final answer 216 cm² है।

questions.stem_en: Find the volume of a cylinder with radius 7 cm and height 10 cm. Use π = 22/7.
questions.stem_hi: Radius 7 cm और height 10 cm वाले cylinder का volume ज्ञात कीजिए। π = 22/7 लें।

options.label: A
options.trap_reason_en: Used curved surface area 2πrh instead of volume πr²h.
options.trap_reason_hi: Volume πr²h की जगह curved surface area 2πrh निकाला।

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Found base area πr² and forgot to multiply by height 10.
options.trap_reason_hi: Base area πr² निकाला, height 10 से multiply नहीं किया।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Used πrh and missed one radius factor.
options.trap_reason_hi: πrh लगाया और r का एक factor छोड़ दिया।

questions.explanation_method_en: Cylinder volume = πr²h = 22/7×7²×10 = 1540 cm³. Therefore, answer = 1540 cm³.
questions.explanation_concept_en: A cylinder stacks identical circular bases through its height. Volume equals base area multiplied by height. Final answer is 1540 cm³.
questions.explanation_method_hi: Cylinder volume = πr²h = 22/7×7²×10 = 1540 cm³। अतः answer = 1540 cm³।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Cylinder में circular base height तक stack होता है। Volume = base area × height। Final answer 1540 cm³ है।

questions.stem_en: Find the area of a triangle with base 12 m and height 8 m.
questions.stem_hi: Base 12 m और height 8 m वाले triangle का area ज्ञात कीजिए।

options.label: B
options.trap_reason_en: Used rectangle area bh and missed the 1/2 factor for a triangle.
options.trap_reason_hi: Rectangle area bh लगा दिया; triangle में 1/2 factor होता है।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Added base and height instead of multiplying and halving.
options.trap_reason_hi: Base और height add कर दिए, multiply करके half नहीं किया।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Averaged base and height. Area is not average of dimensions.
options.trap_reason_hi: Base और height का average ले लिया। Area dimensions का average नहीं है।

questions.explanation_method_en: Triangle area = 1/2 × base × height = 1/2×12×8 = 48 m². Therefore, answer = 48 m².
questions.explanation_concept_en: A triangle with the same base and height occupies exactly half of the corresponding rectangle. Final answer is 48 m².
questions.explanation_method_hi: Triangle area = 1/2 × base × height = 1/2×12×8 = 48 m²। अतः answer = 48 m²।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Same base और height वाला triangle corresponding rectangle का आधा area लेता है। Final answer 48 m² है।

questions.stem_en: Find the area of a square of side 9 cm.
questions.stem_hi: Side 9 cm वाले square का area ज्ञात कीजिए।

options.label: A
options.trap_reason_en: Found perimeter 4a=36 instead of area.
options.trap_reason_hi: Area की जगह perimeter 4a=36 निकाला।

options.label: C
options.trap_reason_en: Doubled the side instead of squaring it.
options.trap_reason_hi: Side को square करने की जगह double कर दिया।

options.label: D
options.trap_reason_en: Used the perimeter number 4a=36 but wrote square units. Area uses side × side.
options.trap_reason_hi: Perimeter number 4a=36 लिया और square units लिख दिए। Area side × side होता है।

questions.explanation_method_en: Square area = side² = 9² = 81 cm². Therefore, answer = 81 cm².
questions.explanation_concept_en: A square has equal length and breadth, so its area is side multiplied by itself. Final answer is 81 cm².
questions.explanation_method_hi: Square area = side² = 9² = 81 cm²। अतः answer = 81 cm²।
questions.explanation_concept_hi: Square में length और breadth equal होते हैं, इसलिए area side × side है। Final answer 81 cm² है।
